Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), cmake (>= 3.16), libjpeg-dev, libpng-dev, libsdl3-dev (>= 3.2.6), libtiff-dev, libwebp-dev, ninja-build, pkgconf, zlib1g-dev
Description: Image loading library for Simple DirectMedia Layer 3 This is a simple library to load images of various formats as SDL surfaces.  It supports the following formats: BMP, GIF, JPEG, LBM, PCX, PNG, PNM, TGA, TIFF, WEBP, XPM, XV.
Package-List: libsdl3-image-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libsdl3-image-doc deb doc optional arch=all profile=!nodoc profile:v1=!nodoc libsdl3-image-tests deb misc optional arch=any profile=!noinsttest profile:v1=!noinsttest libsdl3-image0 deb libs optional arch=any
Testsuite-Triggers: build-essential, cmake, debconf, file, gnome-desktop-testing, ninja-build, pkgconf, xauth, xvfb
Uploaders: Felix Geyer <fgeyer@debian.org>, Manuel A. Fernandez Montecelo <mafm@debian.org>, Simon McVittie <smcv@debian.org>
